description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout, with clean white and gray exterior walls accented by natural wood paneling. The front includes a wooden deck and a covered carport, while the rear opens to a private courtyard with a small pool and lounge area. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor spaces. The landscaping includes several palm trees, enhancing the contemporary, tropical aesthetic. The structure appears to be single-story, with a focus on open-plan living and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a strong connection to the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, wood accents, a carport, and a private courtyard with a pool, surrounded by palm trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden deck, carport with a vehicle, and main entrance framed by palm trees.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the flat roof, open courtyard with pool, and the arrangement of outdoor lounge furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the courtyard, pool, and large windows opening to the backyard, with palm trees nearby.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the carport, wooden fencing, and the transition between the deck and the main building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large sliding glass doors and grouped side windows
